repairs.summary: Replaced the corrupted 33-row partial extraction with the current 85-item restaurant-issued menu, removed eight frozen artifacts or duplicates, restored 60 missing official titles, and retained 51 fixed direct positive ingredient disclosures while leaving 34 results unavailable.
verificationCommands: node --test --test-name-pattern='Atlacatl rebuilds the current official menu' scripts/restaurant-pipeline.test.mjs

notes: Focused Atlacatl regression passed: 85 unique current items in 15 sections, 51 fixed direct positive disclosures, and 34 accurately unavailable results.
Tacos al Carbon and Tortilla remain unavailable because their wheat disclosure is configuration-dependent (flour or corn), not a fixed item ingredient.
